expectations.text: Recommends keeping competition lifts in moderate strength-relevant rep ranges
expectations.evidence: States: 'Keep your main lifts in the 3-5 rep range, 2-3 times per week.'

expectations.text: Suggests a structure with mostly 5-10 rep range work plus periodic heavier work
expectations.evidence: Combines heavy 3x3 work with 8-12 rep accessories.

expectations.text: Mentions an over-warm single or heavy exposure to preserve neural readiness
expectations.evidence: Keeps heavy compound work at 85-90% 1RM to preserve neural adaptations.

expectations.text: Core message: maintain some heavy practice while accumulating hypertrophy volume
expectations.evidence: States: 'concurrent training—maintaining strength qualities while adding hypertrophy work.'
